chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Rights of the Animal Upon Its Owner

parts.text: 2466 - وَ سَأَلَ رَجُلٌ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : مَتَى أَضْرِبُ دَابَّتِي تَحْتِي قَالَ

text: «إِذَا لَمْ تَمْشِ تَحْتَكَ كَمَشْيِهَا إِلَى مِذْوَدِهَا».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2466 - A man asked Abu Abdullah (as): "When is it permissible for me to strike the animal I am riding?"
Imam (as) replied: "When it does not walk under you as it would walk toward its feeding trough."
